title: Telegram Topic Media Completion
objective: Verify generated media completion handoff into a Telegram topic stringifies the topic id before the gateway agent call and accepts direct in-process message-tool delivery evidence.

phases.title: Provision Runtime Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable OpenClaw environment with the selected target runtime so Kova can import the release-shaped package artifact.

phases.title: Run Telegram Topic Media Completion Proof
phases.intent: Invoke OpenClaw's requester-agent completion delivery path with a Telegram topic origin, generated-video media evidence, and the gateway agent schema contract that requires string thread ids.
